title: La calda vita
writer: Pier Antonio Quarantotti Gambini, Marcello Fondato, Elio Bartolini
actors: Catherine Spaak, Fabrizio Capucci, Jacques Perrin
plot: Attractive teenager Sergia usually hangs out with her older sister and her circle of mature friends. For a change, she is convinced by two teenage male friends to go for a beach vacation. Their main motive is to try to win her aff...
